name: R5MonetaryComponentElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 MonetaryComponent to FHIR R4 no direct target type
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 MonetaryComponent to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `MonetaryComponent.type` is part of an existing definition because parent element `MonetaryComponent` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `MonetaryComponent.type` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `MonetaryComponent` is not mapped.
Element `MonetaryComponent.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
